rows.label: tev030201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev030201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Arwe about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev030201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev030201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Arwe if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev030201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Arwe what he did during the attack.

rows.label: tev030201_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Arwe about the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0001
rows.name:
The ship docked in NLA was
traveling between our homeworld
and another planet, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0002
rows.name:
We charted a safe course we
had taken many many MANY many
times before, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Our current plight seems inconceivable.
There were no problems with our engine
or other instruments, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0004
rows.name:
But trying to puzzle it all out now does
nothing but work up my pizza hunger...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm positive I had the technical expertise, you
know? And I certainly had the know-how, correct?
But somehow I always fail my interviews...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0012
rows.name:
All I did was wait a day to show up for
the interview because it was raining. But
were they okay with that? Of course not![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0013
tev030201_MSG0016
rows.name:
I simply do not understand you
humans and your finickiness when
it comes to interviews...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0027
rows.name:
We boarded as many citizens as
we could and evacuated to the
waters to the south, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0028
rows.name:
We were concerned the enemy would
attempt to take either our technology
or our lives, but strangely...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Well, the Growth made no attempt
to pursue us, you know? None![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0030
rows.name:
I can only surmise their
interests may lay...elsewhere?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0035
rows.name:
Despite having been told not to
expect any further Growth attacks,
we're still here, aren't we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0036
rows.name: The Ma-non remain in NLA, don't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG0037
rows.name:
Certainly, there are still a few minor technical
hurdles preventing us from leaving, yes? But for
the most part, we stay here because we we like it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Arwe about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev030201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Arwe about recent developments.

rows.label: tev030201_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Arwe what he did during the attack.

rows.label: tev030201_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Arwe about the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1001
rows.name: What? Our ship, you say? Hmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1002
rows.name:
How do I know you will not use such
information for nefarious purposes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1003
rows.name:
You are only human, aren't you? And
at the moment, I have trouble seeing
that as anything but but a flaw.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1008
rows.name:
I didn't know that humans could be
as terrifying as those monsters in
the Growth, if that makes sense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1009
rows.name:
I knew there were cultural barriers between
us from the interview process, right? But
those gentlemen were always civil, at least.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1010
rows.name:
That nasty business with Alex was a
a wake-up call, wasn't it? I have to
be more vigilant in the future...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1015
rows.name:
Our leaders insisted we board human
citizens and take them to safety,
so I did as commanded, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1016
rows.name:
But I considered the order to be somewhat...ill-advised?
How could we be sure there were not others like
Alex among those we offered refuge?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1017
rows.name:
Scoundrels who would twist our hospitality
into an opportunity to sabotage our ship
and eradicate our very species?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1018
rows.name:
I hope you will forgive me for being so
blunt, okay? I struggle to regard you now
with anything less than complete caution.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1025
rows.name:
Despite having been told not to to
expect any further Growth attacks,
we're still here, aren't we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1026
rows.name: The Ma-non remain in NLA, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1027
rows.name:
I do not know why our leaders
insist we stay, you know? I
can't even fathom the reason.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030201_MSG1028
rows.name:
I long for my homeworld with
every ounce of my being.
Surely you understand this?[ST:wait ]
